records.command: kubectl --context kind-review-env-smoke -n vendor-flow-src-453ded exec deployment/source-arangodb -- sh -lc "rm -rf /tmp/pvc-migrator-dump && arangodump --server.endpoint tcp://127.0.0.1:8529 --server.authentication false --all-databases true --output-directory /tmp/pvc-migrator-dump && tar -C /tmp -cf /tmp/pvc-migrator-dump.tar pvc-migrator-dump"

kubectl --context kind-review-env-smoke -n vendor-flow-src-453ded cp source-arangodb-$(kubectl --context kind-review-env-smoke -n vendor-flow-src-453ded get pods -l app.kubernetes.io/name=source-arangodb -o jsonpath='{.items[0].metadata.name}'):/tmp/pvc-migrator-dump.tar .pvc-migrator-runs/arangodb-source-arangodb.tar
records.description: Copy ArangoDB dump from source-arangodb to local artifact

records.command: kubectl --context kind-review-env-smoke -n vendor-flow-dst-453ded cp .pvc-migrator-runs/arangodb-source-arangodb.tar dest-arangodb-$(kubectl --context kind-review-env-smoke -n vendor-flow-dst-453ded get pods -l app.kubernetes.io/name=dest-arangodb -o jsonpath='{.items[0].metadata.name}'):/tmp/pvc-migrator-dump.tar
records.description: Copy local ArangoDB dump artifact into dest-arangodb

records.command: kubectl --context kind-review-env-smoke -n vendor-flow-dst-453ded exec deployment/dest-arangodb -- sh -lc "rm -rf /tmp/pvc-migrator-dump && mkdir -p /tmp && tar -C /tmp -xf /tmp/pvc-migrator-dump.tar && arangorestore --server.endpoint tcp://127.0.0.1:8529 --server.authentication false --all-databases true --input-directory /tmp/pvc-migrator-dump --create-database true --overwrite true"
